## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between AfterShoot and GrowthX to align on content strategy, production, and reporting](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Shifting focus from free trial conversions to increasing overall traffic as the primary goal](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [Aiming to ramp up content production to 10 outlines per batch, targeting 50,000 words/month](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Need to refine reporting dashboard for better insights, particularly on keyword rankings and cohort performance](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1826.0)
  - [Planning to revisit content clustering and align on new cohorts across teams](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)

## Topics

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Moving away from prioritizing free trial conversions to focusing on increasing overall traffic](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=707.0)
  - [AfterShoot facing plateau in unique blog visitors and keyword visibility issues](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=787.0)
  - [Only 200-250 keywords ranking in positions 1-3, presenting opportunity for growth](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=827.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on top-of-funnel (TOFU) content while AfterShoot handles mid and bottom-funnel in-house](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Aiming to increase production from current 3 articles/week to 5/week initially, then 10 outlines per batch](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
  - [Streamlining feedback process: comments on one outline often applicable across multiple pieces](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1602.0)
  - [Updating shared Notion doc on content process to reflect new workflow and production targets](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1591.0)
  - [Goal to reach 50,000 words/month as stipulated in contract](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1644.0)

### Keyword Research and Topics

  - [Meenakshi to provide updated keyword list, focusing on photographer-centric topics](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Ehtisham to add new topics/keywords to shared sheet for approval](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Avoiding Lightroom-specific content due to competitive concerns with Adobe](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1504.0)
  - [Teams to align on content cohorts and mapping exercise results](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1427.0)

### Reporting Dashboard Improvements

  - [Current dashboard overwhelming with data but lacking actionable insights](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1767.0)
  - [Need for better visualization, particularly on keyword rankings (top 3, top 10)](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Issues with data discrepancies (20% "haircut") between dashboard and original sources](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2050.0)
  - [GrowthX working on new native dashboard solution (Atlas) to replace current Looker setup](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2135.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Meenakshi to provide updated keyword list and sanity check existing topics by tomorrow](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1236.0)
  - [Ehtisham to start keyword research focusing on traffic potential, share results on Slack](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2298.0)
  - [Teams to revisit and align on content clustering/cohort definitions](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2089.0)
  - [GrowthX to refine reporting dashboard, focusing on keyword position data and cohort insights](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2249.0)
  - [AfterShoot to share "wishlist" of target keywords to rank for](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=2358.0)
  - [Aim to increase content production to 10 outlines per batch in coming weeks](https://fathom.video/share/T1nB9SLYzLWFhjD7sunzKMazbWrceVbp?tab=summary&timestamp=1617.0)
